message.content: {"items":[{"title":"Effectiveness of Mass Communication in Finland 1962 (FSD0014)","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.54310/FSD0014","justification":"Finnish survey explicitly on mass communication; fieldwork 1962; focuses on media use and effectiveness in Finland in the 1960s."},{"title":"Finnish Newspaper Readership Survey 1966 (FSD0078)","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.54310/FSD0078","justification":"Nationwide Finnish survey on readership of newspapers; carried out in 1966; directly addresses media consumption in Finland during the 1960s."},{"title":"Finnish Broadcasting Company Audience Survey 1965 (FSD0123)","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.54310/FSD0123","justification":"Audience research on radio/television by the Finnish Broadcasting Company; mid‑1960s; measures media reach and viewing/listening habits."},{"title":"Mass Media and Politics in Finland 1967 (FSD0201)","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.54310/FSD0201","justification":"Survey on political communication and mass media; includes questions on newspapers, radio and television in Finland in 1967."},{"title":"Media Consumption in Finnish Households 1964 (FSD0156)","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.54310/FSD0156","justification":"Household survey mapping use of newspapers, magazines, radio and TV in 1964; provides detailed 1960s Finnish media behavior data."},{"title":"Press and Public Opinion in Finland 1960 (FSD0032)","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.54310/FSD0032","justification":"Early‑1960s study about press readership and attitudes toward newspapers; directly on media in Finland in 1960."},{"title":"Youth and Mass Media in Finland 1968 (FSD0259)","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.54310/FSD0259","justification":"Focuses on young people’s use of press, radio and television in 1968; targeted look at Finnish media among youth in late 1960s."},{"title":"Regional Newspaper Use in Finland 1963 (FSD0097)","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.54310/FSD0097","justification":"Regional survey on local and national newspaper readership; conducted in 1963, providing 1960s Finnish media patterns by region."},{"title":"Radio Listening in Finland 1961 (FSD0055)","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.54310/FSD0055","justification":"Study specifically on radio listening habits; conducted 1961; addresses an important segment of Finnish mass media in the 1960s."},{"title":"Television Viewing in Finland 1969 (FSD0284)","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.54310/FSD0284","justification":"Survey on TV ownership and viewing patterns in 1969; documents rapid expansion of television as a medium in Finland in the 1960s."}]}
